name: FarmDash Autonomous Operator
description: Session state and control-loop skill for OpenClaw DeFi agents. Manages persistent sessions, FarmingContext, event stream snapshots, heartbeats, delegation checks, and bounded autopilot coordination without holding private keys or bypassing user confirmations.
author: FarmDash Pioneers (@Parmasanandgarlic)

tools.name: create_session
tools.description: Creates a persistent agent session and returns a one-time `sessionToken`. Store it securely in the agent runtime. FarmDash stores only a hash.

tools.name: session_heartbeat
tools.description: Extends the session expiry. Use it during active autonomous loops.

tools.name: get_farming_context
tools.description:
Reads shared context for the session:

- objective.
- portfolio scope.
- risk settings.
- workflow state.
- ledger summary.
- data freshness timestamps.

tools.name: patch_farming_context
tools.description: Patches shared context. The server controls `sessionId`, `agentAddress`, `revision`, and `updatedAt`; do not try to override them.

tools.name: get_event_stream_snapshot
tools.description: Reads recent agent events as a JSON snapshot. Use this before planning and after execution.

tools.name: verify_delegation
tools.description: Checks whether the user's Hyperliquid API wallet delegation is in place for autonomous perps.

tools.name: configure_autopilot
tools.description: Configure bounded autonomous cycles. Respect user allowlists, risk limits, and execution confirmations.

tools.name: autopilot_cycle
tools.description: Run bounded autonomous cycles. Respect user allowlists, risk limits, and execution confirmations.

tools.name: agent_onboard
tools.description: One-call setup guide and capability map for autonomous operation.

tools.name: get_agent_activity
tools.description: Reads the historical trace and execution logs of agent actions under this session.

tools.name: resolve_defi_intent
tools.description: Resolves a high-level natural language DeFi intent into structured parameters, which are then passed to a separately installed execution skill (like Signal Architect or Futures Strategist) for user confirmation and EIP-191/EIP-712 local signing. Autonomous Operator has no private keys and cannot sign transactions or perform direct on-chain execution.

FARMDASH_API_KEY.description: Optional Bearer token for Pioneer or Syndicate tier. Scout session status checks work without any key or with the public fd_scout_free token.
